svg.text: The COCOMO II Basic Model is used for effort and schedule estimation. The project is classified as an
Organic project (small team, well-understood requirements, stable technology). The model formula is:
For Organic mode: a = 2.4, b = 1.05. Schedule (months) = 2.5 * Effort^0.38
Login routes, session middleware, role detection

Faculty dashboard, course ratings, comment view
